# @rds-vue-ui/form-checkbox

A customizable Vue 3 checkbox component with v-model support, multiple sizes, visual variants, slot-based labels, and full theme compatibility for modern UI design.

## Demo

Explore the interactive demo in Storybook under the `Form / FormCheckbox` section

## Install

### Using yarn

`yarn add --registry=https://npm.edpl.us @rds-vue-ui/form-checkbox`

## Usage

`import { FormCheckbox } from "@rds-vue-ui/form-checkbox"`

**Note:** Please note that we assume that you have `@rds-vue-ui/rds-theme-base` installed as a dependency to your vue-based project and have included `@rds-vue-ui/rds-theme-base` in the `main.js` or main file of vue-based application.

## Props

| Prop                       | Type                                                    | Required / Optional | Default   | Description |
|----------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------|----------------------|-----------|-------------|
| `id`                       | `string`                                                | Required           | —         | Used to link the checkbox with a `<label>` using `for="${id}"`. |
| `name`                     | `string`                                                | Optional             | —         | Specifies the `name` attribute for the checkbox input. |
| `label`                    | `string`                                                | Optional             | —         | Text label displayed next to the checkbox. |
| `size`                     | `"xs" \| "sm" \| "lg" \| "xl" \| "xxl"`                 | Optional             | `"lg"`    | Sets the size of the checkbox and label font size if labelSize props not provided. |
| `v-model`                  | `boolean`                                               | Optional             | —         | Two-way binding for checkbox state via `v-model`. |
| `indeterminate`                  | `boolean`                               | Optional            | —          | Describe the indertminate state of checkbox.
| `checked`                  | `boolean`                                               | Optional             | —         | Initial checked state when not using `v-model`. |
| `required`                 | `boolean`                                               | Optional             | —         | Indicates whether the checkbox must be checked before form submission. |
| `disabled`                 | `boolean`                                               | Optional             | —         | Disables the checkbox, preventing user interaction. |
| `iconPosition`             | `"left" \| "right"`                                     | Optional             | `"left"`  | Position of the checkbox icon relative to the label. |
| `variant`                  | `"filled" \| "outline"`                                 | Optional             | `"filled"`| Visual style of the checkbox. |
| `tickColor`                | `string`                                                | Optional             | —         | Custom color for the tick icon when checked. |
| `checkedVariant`           | `string`                                                | Optional             | —         | Background color (filled) or border color (outline) when checked. |
| `uncheckedVariant`         | `string`                                                | Optional             | —         | Color used for the checkbox outline when not checked. |
| `checkboxBgVariant`        | `string`                                                | Optional             | —         | Color variant used for the checkbox background. |
| `focusedVariant`           | `string`                                                | Optional             | —         | Outline color variant shown when checkbox is focused. |
| `bounded`                  | `boolean`                                               | Optional             | —         | Enables a surrounding visual boundary around the checkbox and label. |
| `boundedActiveVariant`     | `string`                                                | Optional             | —         | Background color for the checkbox container when checked and `bounded` is true. |
| `boundedActiveTextVariant` | `string`                                                | Optional             | —         | Text color of the label when the checkbox is both checked and bounded. |
| `boundedVariant`           | `string`                                                | Optional             | —         | Border color variant for the container when `bounded` is true. |
| `labelVariant`             | `string`                                                | Optional             | —         | Color variant used for the label text. |
| `labelWeight`              | `string`                                                | Optional             | —         | Font weight applied to the label (e.g., `"regular"`, `"bold"`). |
| `labelSize`                | `string`                                                | Optional             | —         | Font size applied to the label. |



## Events

| Event     | Description                                   | Parameters                                                                 |
|-----------|-----------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `@changed` | Triggered when the checkbox state changes.    | - `event`: `Event` – The native change event.  <br> - `checkedState`: `boolean` – The new checked state of the input. |



## Slots

- `default` - Use this slot to provide a custom label with custom HTML or components. Any content provided will override the default label prop. If the slot is left empty, the component will fall back to displaying the text from the label prop.


## Examples
```js
<template>
  <div>
    <h1 class="mb-space-sm"># Example of checkbox component</h1>
    <div>
      <h2>Sizes </h2>
      <div class="d-flex flex-wrap mt-space-sm" style="gap: 1rem">
        <form-checkbox id="checkbox-example-1" label="xs size" size="xs"  />
        <form-checkbox id="checkbox-example-2" label="sm size" size="sm" />
        <form-checkbox id="checkbox-example-3" label="lg size" size="lg" />
        <form-checkbox id="checkbox-example-4" label="xl size" size="xl" />
        <form-checkbox id="checkbox-example-5" label="xxl size" size="xxl" />
      </div>

      <hr />
    </div>

    <div>
      <h2>color variant and bounded</h2>
      <div class="d-flex flex-wrap mt-space-sm" style="gap: 1rem">
        <form-checkbox id="checkbox-example-6" label="info checkbox with primary outline" checked-variant="info"  focused-variant="primary" />
        <form-checkbox id="checkbox-example-7" label="custom tick color" size="sm" tick-color="#fff"  />
        <form-checkbox id="checkbox-example-8" label="bounded " bounded />
        <form-checkbox id="checkbox-example-9" label="bounded with custom color"  bounded  bounded-active-variant="primary" bounded-active-text-variant="light-3" checked-variant="warning" focused-variant="info" tick-color="#8c1d40" />
        <form-checkbox id="checkbox-example-10" label="bounded with outline variant"  bounded  bounded-active-variant="primary" bounded-active-text-variant="light-3" checked-variant="warning" focused-variant="info" tick-color="#8c1d40"  variant="outline"/>
        <form-checkbox id="checkbox-example-11" label="Unchecked checkbox custom color variant" unchecked-variant="dark-3"  focused-variant="info"/>
      </div>

      <hr />
    </div>
    <div>
      <h2>Custom Label</h2>
      <div class="d-flex flex-wrap mt-space-sm" style="gap: 1rem">
        <form-checkbox id="checkbox-example-12" label="Label text with sm text and light weight variant primary " label-weight="light" label-size="sm" label-variant="primary"  />
        <form-checkbox id="checkbox-example-13"  label="Error label with bold text and xl text" label-weight="bold" label-size="xl" label-variant="danger" />
        <form-checkbox id="checkbox-example-14"  >
          <p  style="padding:0px;margin: 0px">with <i>slot</i> which uses custom <b>html elements</b>.</p>
        </form-checkbox>
      </div>

      <hr />
    </div>


    <div>
      <h2>Disabled</h2>
      <div class="d-flex flex-wrap mt-space-sm" style="gap: 1rem">
        <form-checkbox id="checkbox-example-15" label="simple disabled " disabled   />
        <form-checkbox id="checkbox-example-16" label="primary label disabled " unchecked-variant="primary" disabled  label-variant="primary" />
        <form-checkbox id="checkbox-example-17" label="checked primary  disabled " checked checked-variant="primary" disabled  label-variant="primary" />
        <form-checkbox id="checkbox-example-18" label="outline checked info  disabled " checked checked-variant="info" variant="outline" disabled  label-variant="info" />

      </div>

      <hr />
    </div>


    <div>
      <h2>Style variant</h2>
      <div class="d-flex flex-wrap mt-space-sm" style="gap: 1rem">
        <form-checkbox id="checkbox-example-19" variant="outline" label="Outline variant" />
        <form-checkbox id="checkbox-example-20" label="Filled Variant"  />

      </div>

      <hr />
    </div>


    <div>
      <h2>v-model (2-way bounded)</h2>
      <div class="d-flex flex-wrap mt-space-sm" style="gap: 1rem">
        <form-checkbox id="checkbox-example-21" variant="outline" :label="'is checked '+value " v-model="value" />
      </div>

      <hr />
    </div>



    <div>
      <h2>required asterisk (*)</h2>
      <div class="d-flex flex-wrap mt-space-sm" style="gap: 1rem">
        <form-checkbox id="checkbox-example-22" variant="outline" label="Required *" />
      </div>


        <div class="d-flex flex-wrap mt-space-sm" style="gap: 1rem">
        <form-checkbox id="checkbox-example-23" variant="outline"  >
        <p  class="p-0 m-0">Required <span class="text-danger" >*</span></p>
        </form-checkbox>
      </div>

      <hr />
    </div>


      <div>
      <h2>Indeterminate State Example</h2>
      <div class="d-flex flex-column mt-space-sm" style="gap:0.5rem">
        <form-checkbox
          id="checkbox-group-parent"
          label="Select All Items"
          :checked="parentCheckbox"
          :indeterminate="indeterminate"
          @changed="toggleAllChildren"
        />
       <div style="margin-left: 1.5rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem;">
          <form-checkbox id="checkbox-child-1" label="Item 1" v-model="allItems.child1"   />
          <form-checkbox id="checkbox-child-2" label="Item 2" v-model="allItems.child2" />
          <form-checkbox id="checkbox-child-3" label="Item 3" v-model="allItems.child3"/>
        </div>
      </div>
     
      <hr />
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

<script lang="ts" setup>
import { FormCheckbox } from "@/components/form-checkbox";

import { ref, watch } from "vue";

const value = ref(true);
const parentCheckbox= ref(false);
const indeterminate= ref(false);

// For Indeterminate State Example
const allItems = ref<Record<string, boolean>>({"child1":false,"child2":false,"child3":false});
const selectedItems = ref<string[]>([]); // Array to hold selected child items





// Function to toggle all child checkboxes based on parent's state
const toggleAllChildren = (e:Event,checked: boolean) => {

  const item=allItems.value
  Object.keys(item).forEach((key) => {
      console.log( item[key] , checked)
    item[key] = checked;
  });
  allItems.value={...item}

};

watch(()=>allItems.value,(newValue)=>{
  const values=Object.values(newValue)
  const uncheckedCount=values.filter(v=>!v).length
  indeterminate.value=uncheckedCount>0 && uncheckedCount<values.length
  parentCheckbox.value=uncheckedCount==0;


}, { deep: true, immediate: true } )

</script>

```

We use [SemVer](http://semver.org/) for versioning.
